taxonomy: Carelia latifolia is classified under the family Polygonaceae, which is a group of plants commonly known as buckwheat or smartweed. This family is further classified under the order Polygonales and the class Magnoliopsida. The order Polygonales is a monotypic order that contains only the family Polygonaceae. Carelia latifolia is a species of flowering plant that is native to certain regions, and it is known for its distinctive characteristics. The classification of Carelia latifolia is a part of the broader botanical classification system that helps to understand the evolutionary relationships among different plant species.
